findings.description: PascalCase class name `I18nHandler` is referenced in the handler implementation example in s1 but is absent from s1 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source defines `public class I18nHandler implements HttpRequestHandler` as the example handler for LanguageAttributeInHttpCookie/Session language switching.

findings.description: PascalCase class name `I18nHandler` is referenced in the handler implementation example in s2 but is absent from s2 hints.
